The phrase 'Authentication and Access Control' is repeated twice in the same paragraph element, along with a mangled word 'Controlebinar', while it appears only once in the corresponding text on Page 5 of the source document.

concerns.analysis: There is an instance of content duplication in the 'Upcoming Events' section. The text for the September 7 event, which is a single line in the PDF, appears as two distinct lines in the HTML with the phrase 'Authentication and Access' repeated. Additionally, a mangled term 'Controlebinar' appears in the second line, which seems to be a corrupted duplication of parts of the original text ('Control' + 'Webinar').
